visual_description: A man in a light blue shirt stands in an office holding a white cup and takes a sip, while a seated man in a white shirt looks on and handles a small object. The background shows a wall of framed photographs and another person walking past. The standing man lowers the cup and glances downward.
audio_description: The audio is quiet with faint office ambience and a subtle clink as the cup is lifted, with no clear speech audible.
